description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible just to the top right quadrant of the center of the reticle. The background shows an indistinct mountain range.This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B10
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025. The report consisted of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO, and an accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle, showing a small, dark, circular, blurry object just to the top right quadrant of the center of the reticle. The background shows an indistinct mountain range.
bust_reasoning: The document consists of a single, low-quality, grainy, black-and-white image of a small, blurry, circular object. There is no description of behavior, kinematics, or corroborating sensor data or witness accounts. This complete lack of detail and independent verification makes it impossible to rule out numerous mundane explanations, aligning with the highest bust score category.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B10 - Page 1

# FBI Photo B10

[Redacted]

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white surveillance or targeting camera feed. The image features a central crosshair reticle with a small, dark, blurry object near the center. There are black redaction bars obscuring portions of the image on the left and right sides.]

12/31/99 18:10:50
cover_up_reasoning: The document is a single photo with minimal redactions, primarily black bars obscuring portions of the image and a single '[Redacted]' text placeholder. These redactions appear to be routine for sensitive information such as camera details or location identifiers, rather than indicating substantial concealment of an anomalous event or its investigation.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告。该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑和删节，且未提供随附的任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置。该单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，带有中心十字线分划板，显示一个小型、黑暗、圆形、模糊的物体，位于分划板中心右上方象限。背景显示模糊的山脉。
reported_object_description_zh: 小型、黑暗、圆形、模糊物体
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅包含一张低质量、颗粒状的黑白图像，显示一个小型、模糊、圆形物体。报告中未描述其行为、运动学特征，亦无佐证的传感器数据或目击者证词。这种细节和独立验证的完全缺失，使得无法排除众多世俗解释，符合最高“揭穿”评分类别。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件为一张照片，删节极少，主要为遮蔽图像部分的黑色条块以及一个“[已删节]”文本占位符。这些删节似乎是针对相机详细信息或位置标识符等敏感信息的例行操作，而非表明对异常事件或其调查的实质性隐瞒。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO in 2025
Report included a still image from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
No accompanying mission report was provided
Operator was unable to positively identify the UAP
The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
The image shows a small, dark, circular, blurry object
claims_zh: 联邦调查局于2025年向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像
原始图像经过编辑和删节
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置
图像显示一个小型、黑暗、圆形、模糊的物体
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The image is grainy, blurry, and black-and-white, making the small, circular object highly susceptible to being an internal camera artifact or lens flare, especially given the lack of other context.
Bird, bat, or insect at close range: A small, dark, blurry object could easily be an animal flying close to the camera lens, appearing out of focus and indistinct.
Distant aircraft or drone: A small, dark, blurry object could represent a conventional aircraft or a drone at a distance, appearing indistinct due to image quality and lack of zoom.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：该图像颗粒状、模糊且为黑白，使得该小型圆形物体极易被误认为是内部相机伪影或镜头光晕，尤其是在缺乏其他背景信息的情况下。
近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：一个小型、黑暗、模糊的物体很可能是在相机镜头附近飞行的动物，显得失焦且模糊不清。
远距离飞机或无人机：一个小型、黑暗、模糊的物体可能代表远处的常规飞机或无人机，由于图像质量和缺乏变焦而显得模糊不清。
cover_up_indicators: black redaction bars obscuring portions of the image
cover_up_indicators_zh: 遮蔽图像部分的黑色删节条块
